'''Pek Rankin''' was a [[Balawai]] man who lived in [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. One night, the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] destroyed a entire Balawai village, but Pek and few survivors were able to get away. During the escape, they lost five children: [[Terrel Nakay]], [[Pell Nakay|Pell]], [[Keela Nakay|Keela]], [[Urno]], and [[Nykl]]. Rankin led the group that finally found them, but before they could reunite with the children, they were attacked by [[Kar Vastor]] and his [[Akk Guard]]s. He did not survive.

==Appearances==
